evals.prompt: Look up the entity 4faff0b210cb49958e20109409b8699c and show its name, types, and properties.
evals.expected_output: A single-entity fetch via the entity(id:) query returning name, types, and typed value fields.
assertions: Uses the entity(id: "...") query (single-entity lookup), not a list query
Reads typed value fields (text/date/boolean/...), not a single 'value' field
Does not wrap entity fields in nodes { ... }

evals.prompt: Find the first 50 Person entities in the AI space (41e851610e13a19441c4d980f2f2ce6b).
evals.expected_output: A bounded search using entities(typeId, spaceId, first: 50) returning a flat array of id/name.
assertions: Passes typeId and spaceId as top-level args (not inside filter)
Treats entities() as a flat array (no nodes wrapper)

evals.prompt: List every Claim in the AI space — there are several thousand.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes the result set exceeds the offset-1000 cap and uses entitiesConnection with cursor pagination.
assertions: Does not paginate entities() past offset 1000
